Dear Jeaffrey, thanks so much for helping me.
Because of you my dream
almost come true, thank you so much!
My tuition will cost about 600
Euros a month.The school term is
from sept. to april,so my school fees,not counting
my housing,will be about
5000 Euros.I dont know

to my account(
LT847300010089010885),or pay the school
directly when I get there,because i dont have the
school info jet.As to the
housing,i am looking for
a place in France because it is cheaper.I will let
you know what i find and
write you as soon as I get
something set up.
